---
title: "Frances Mary Clarke"
---

## Frances Mary Clarke

**Dates:** (1835/6-1882)

### Description

wife of the Rev. James Langton Clarke (b. 1833/4)

### Biography

She was born at Whitburn, and may have been related to the Collinson and Harrison families of Whitburn.

### Letters

- Letter from June 7th 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
